name: Perpetual Credit Income Trust
analysis: PCI has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 8% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.4× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$1.0950, stop A$1.0444, target A$1.2467 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
